en-US.name: Cigar Humidor: Humidity Guide
en-US.subtitle: Daily RH Forecast for Cellar
en-US.promotional_text: Cigar collector? Check today's dew point and get a daily RH verdict for your humidor. Per-cigar guidance for maduro, connecticut, and aging wrappers.
en-US.description:
Stop guessing whether your humidor needs a Boveda swap today. Cigar Humidor: Humidity Guide tells you where your relative humidity is drifting based on outdoor dew point and your cigar profile.

Every cigar enthusiast knows the frustration: a humidor that held 68% RH last week suddenly cracks a wrapper today. The reason sits in the weather data — dew point, ambient temperature, how often the lid opens — that nobody wants to read every morning. Maduro burns better at 65% RH, Connecticut prefers 68%, long-term aging asks for stable 70%, and a 70 F room creates beetle risk regardless of RH.

HOW IT WORKS

1. Add your humidor: desktop, cabinet, wineador, or cooler, with a target RH band.
2. Add your cigars with wrapper, ring gauge, and aging goal.
3. Cigar Humidor pulls your local dew point and gives a per-cigar RH verdict plus a one-line drift summary.

Under a minute to set up. No account required.

CORE FEATURES

Daily RH Verdict
A clear verdict for each cigar based on outdoor dew point, humidor type, and wrapper profile. Updated every day with the reason in plain English.

Outdoor Dew Point Auto-Fetch
Local weather data fetched from a public weather API. No manual entry needed. Coordinates are truncated before any logging and never stored on a server.

Manual Hygrometer Entry
Cross-check your calibrated hygrometer reading against the app verdict to catch sensor drift early.

Wrapper Library
Supports maduro, connecticut, habano, sumatra, candela, and oscuro wrappers across robusto, toro, and churchill ring gauges, with RH targets informed by published cigar storage references.

PRO FEATURES
Upgrade to Pro for deeper insights:
- Track multiple humidor profiles
- Unlimited cigars in your collection
- 7-day RH drift forecast
- Acclimation timer for cooler to desktop transfers
- Custom RH alerts via push notifications
- RH history log with CSV export
- Per-cigar smoking journal
- Beetle-risk early warning when ambient temperature climbs

PRIVACY FIRST
- No account, no login
- All data stored locally on your device
- Location is used only to fetch dew point data from Open-Meteo. Coordinates are never stored on any server.
- No tracking, no ads, no third-party analytics

Cigar Humidor: Humidity Guide provides general humidity guidance based on local weather data and published cigar storage references. It is not a substitute for a calibrated hygrometer or consultation with experienced cigar handlers. For adult use only — must be 21 or older in the US.
